stage_prompt.name: Scaffold devplatform

comprehension_gate.rule: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION. Present structured summary (objective / work items / files / verification / risks). STOP and WAIT for Lead Architect approval before proceeding.

v2_updates.note: Additive to v1 work_items 1.1–1.10. Apply alongside.

item.name: .gitignore must NOT ignore state.json itself
item.description: tools/autonomy_budget/state.json IS tracked (committed schema_version=1 baseline) AND mutated at runtime. We WANT git to surface drift so wake_launcher updates are reviewable. Only ignore sibling lock/tmp files.
item.gitignore_additions: # autonomy_budget runtime locks (state.json itself IS tracked) tools/autonomy_budget/state.json.lock tools/autonomy_budget/state.json.tmp

item.name: Vikunja project + label ID registry seed
item.description: Stage 0.10.v2 captured Fleet Reports project_id=8. Pre-seed `devplatform/projects/registry.yaml` with locked label IDs (1–14) and known projects so Stage 1.4 doesn't re-create them.
item.registry_seed: # devplatform/projects/registry.yaml labels: Active: 1 Complete: 2 Blocked: 3 Architecture: 4 Infrastructure: 5 Testing: 6 Documentation: 7 Security: 8 Gate:Pending-SDO: 9 Gate:Pending-CoLead: 10 Gate:Pending-Human: 11 Gate:Approved: 12 Gate:Rejected: 13 Gate:Escalation: 14 projects: fleet_reports: 8

item.name: Document worktrees as project-scoped, not platform-scoped
item.description: The BlarAI-worktrees sibling pattern (C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI-worktrees\) is BlarAI-specific. devplatform should NOT inherit it. Add note to devplatform/README.md.

stage_prompt.objective: Scaffold the empty `C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\` repository alongside BlarAI. No files are moved from BlarAI. After this stage: devplatform exists as a git repo with its own .venv, directory skeleton, and placeholder config files. BlarAI is untouched. Fleet is still disabled from Stage 0.

preconditions.check: Branch `chore/platform-extraction` active on BlarAI side (though this stage touches devplatform, not BlarAI).

item.name: Initialize git repo (no remote)
item.command: cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git init; git branch -M main
item.verify: cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git status; git branch --show-current

item.name: Create .gitignore
item.file: __pycache__/ *.pyc .venv/ .pytest_cache/ .mypy_cache/ *.log tools/vikunja/*.db tools/vikunja/files/ tools/vikunja_mcp/bridge/state.json tools/vikunja_mcp/bridge/processed.json # Secrets files (should be referenced from env, never committed) .env .env.local

item.name: Create project registry and Vikunja project IDs
item.description: Create the "DevPlatform-Meta" Vikunja project via MCP and capture the BlarAI project ID. Use mcp__vikunja__list_projects to discover the existing BlarAI project ID (whichever ID Vikunja currently has for it). NOTE: Stage 0.4 stopped Vikunja and the bridge to quiesce the DB for backup. Vikunja MUST be running for the MCP calls in this item to succeed. Restart Vikunja temporarily here, do the MCP calls, then stop it again so we re-enter Stage 4 with a clean known-stopped state.

steps.step: Restart Vikunja temporarily: cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\tools\vikunja; Start-Process .\vikunja-v2.3.0-windows-4.0-amd64.exe; Start-Sleep 3; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3456/api/v1/info -ErrorAction Stop # confirm reachable
Call `mcp__vikunja__list_projects` — record the ID of the existing BlarAI-related project(s).
Call `mcp__vikunja__create_project` with title="DevPlatform-Meta", description="Platform-layer work: fleet tools, MCP, governance." — record the returned ID.
Write the IDs to both registry files below.
Stop Vikunja again to restore Stage-0.4 quiesced state: Get-Process -Name "vikunja*" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

item.file: # Registry of projects the platform coordinates. # Every fleet tool MUST pass explicit project_id when querying Vikunja (Master Plan §D.1). projects: blarai: root: "C:/Users/mrbla/BlarAI" vikunja_project_id: <FILL_FROM_STEP_1> config: "projects/blarai.yaml" devplatform_meta: root: "C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform" vikunja_project_id: <FILL_FROM_STEP_2> config: "projects/devplatform_meta.yaml"

# BlarAI project config (allowlist, paths, env vars). # Populated further in Stage 2. name: blarai root: "C:/Users/mrbla/BlarAI" vikunja_project_id: <FILL> allowlist: # Stage 2 will migrate autonomy_budget/config.yaml allowlist here paths: []
name: devplatform_meta root: "C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform" vikunja_project_id: <FILL> allowlist: paths: []

item.name: Create BlarAI-side reverse lookup
item.description: On BlarAI side, create `.platform/` directory and write the Vikunja ID lookup so BlarAI-scoped commands can find its project ID even if called standalone.
item.file: # Reverse lookup so BlarAI-scoped scripts can find their Vikunja project ID. # Authoritative source is devplatform/projects/registry.yaml. blarai_project_id: <FILL> devplatform_meta_project_id: <FILL>

item.name: Create minimal pyproject.toml placeholder
item.description: Stub only — real content comes in Stage 3 when tools are copied.
item.file:
[project] name = "devplatform" version = "0.1.0" description = "Claude development platform — Co-Lead / SDO / EA fleet and MCP infrastructure" requires-python = ">=3.11" dependencies = []
[tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths = ["tools"]

item.name: Create placeholder CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md
item.description: Minimal placeholders — fully written in Stage 6 (Hardening). They exist now so the devplatform directory feels complete.
item.file:
# DevPlatform — Claude Desktop Instructions (placeholder)
This is the standalone Claude development platform. It manages multiple projects, BlarAI being the first.
Full content will be written in Stage 6 of platform separation. Until then, use `C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\CLAUDE.md` for authoritative guidance.

# AGENTS.md — devplatform pointer
See `CLAUDE.md` and `.github/copilot-instructions.md`. Populated in Stage 6.

# DevPlatform — Copilot Instructions (placeholder)
Populated in Stage 6 of platform separation.

item.name: Initial commit in devplatform
item.command: cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git add .; git commit -m "Scaffold: initial devplatform skeleton"

item.name: Update STATUS.md
item.description: Mark Stage 1 COMPLETE. Record: devplatform git hash, BlarAI Vikunja project ID, DevPlatform-Meta project ID.

rollback.trigger: If 1.4 Vikunja MCP calls fail, or any git command fails.

steps.step: If Vikunja project "DevPlatform-Meta" was created, delete via mcp__vikunja__delete_project.

exit_criteria.criterion: `C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\` exists with directory skeleton, .venv, .gitignore, pyproject.toml, and placeholder docs.
devplatform is a git repo with exactly 1 commit on main.
Vikunja registry YAMLs reference real project IDs (not `<FILL>`).
BlarAI has `.platform/vikunja_project_ids.yaml` but NO other changes.
Fleet scheduled tasks remain Disabled from Stage 0.
